item.author: @_akhaliq

item.title:
For those affected, you're going to see a lot of advice on social media for what to do next.
I like...
item.description:
For those affected, you're going to see a lot of advice on social media for what to do next.
I like Claire's tweet a lot. Here's my version of her tweet for millennial/gen x business professionals:
- download claude desktop app and purchase at least the $20/mo claude account - go into cowork or claude code and describe a full day of work, core competencies, what you worked on before, metrics you were goaled on, your experience in AI so far, your technical skillset, and ask "what are the top 10 high-leverage skills we can build together right now that would make me a 10x <job> instead of a 2x"....then review those 10, pick your top 5, iterate more, get about a dozen - create a portfolio site with claude design (web browser capability), show the skills in action, show you testing and using the skills, talk through the business impact of each skill, publish it (i prefer vercel) - link the portfolio page to all your social profiles and share with friends, offer to teach folks those skills for $$ - create several social posts that start with "i'm a <job>, i was just laid off, and here's how i'm using ai today" or "here are the top x ways a <job> can use agents and skills" or "i'm a <job> and i just built an ai agent that <value>" and link your portfolio in all of them - take either anthropic's free claude code courses, my free courses, or my mastermind (I've already helped several laid off people find new jobs)
I'm sorry to those affected. It's easy for me to say "this is a great time to reskill or pivot!", but it's truly what I believe and the steps above take a few days maximum. Anyone can do it. No coding required.
https://t.co/QteHXDl4BU
--- @alliekmiller | ❤️ 6 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 358
item.author: @alliekmiller

item.title: GPT-5.5 Instant is rolling out over the next two days as the default model to all ChatGPT users, and...
item.description:
GPT-5.5 Instant is rolling out over the next two days as the default model to all ChatGPT users, and as ‘gpt-5.5-chat-latest’ in the API.
Personalization improvements are rolling out to Plus and Pro users on the web, and soon on mobile.
Memory sources are rolling out across all ChatGPT consumer plans on the web, and soon on mobile. https://t.co/SxAxEzPnC9
--- @OpenAI | ❤️ 180 | 🔁 15 | 💬 9 | 👁 18076
item.author: @OpenAI

item.title:
We’re also improving memory and personalization.
ChatGPT can now better use context from saved memo...
item.description:
We’re also improving memory and personalization.
ChatGPT can now better use context from saved memories, past chats, files, and connected Gmail accounts to give more personalized responses.
Memory sources show what relevant context was used to personalize a response and allow you to update, delete, or disconnect as needed.
--- @OpenAI | ❤️ 374 | 🔁 20 | 💬 16 | 👁 30248
item.author: @OpenAI

item.title:
GPT-5.5 Instant is starting to roll out in ChatGPT.
It’s a big upgrade, giving you smarter, clearer...
item.description:
GPT-5.5 Instant is starting to roll out in ChatGPT.
It’s a big upgrade, giving you smarter, clearer, and more personalized answers in a warmer, more natural tone.
And it's also more concise, which we heard you wanted. We think you'll love chatting with it. https://t.co/HSQOhjqxp7
--- @OpenAI | ❤️ 1872 | 🔁 173 | 💬 153 | 👁 68158
item.author: @OpenAI
